description: Mollie is a European payments platform for online and in-person payment processing, including payment links, recurring billing, terminals, and platform/marketplace payment capabilities. It provides merchant and platform infrastructure for accepting, managing, and reporting on payments.
summary: Mollie exposes a public REST API at `https://api.mollie.com/v2` and an MCP server at `https://mcp.mollie.com/mcp`; both require Mollie-issued bearer credentials, and no official GraphQL API or CLI was found.
